nodes.name: schedule-10am
nodes.notes: Runs every day at 10:00. Sends follow-ups to warm leads in the 4–12 day window.

nodes.name: get-warm-leads
nodes.notes: Returns prospects with open_count > 0, status not in replied/booked/unsubscribed. Array is auto-split by typeVersion 4.2.

nodes.name: filter-and-build
nodes.notes: Filters leads in the 4–12 day window (email_sent_at), no recent clicks, opened > 1 day ago. Builds follow-up email HTML.

nodes.name: send-followup
nodes.notes: IMPORTANT: emailFormat must be 'html' (not emailType). Sends from hello@nrankai.com — use a sending domain alias if available.
